resumePoint.description: Wave 2b canonicalization complete: src/lib Effect function/const exports are now unsuffixed, sync survivors use *Sync, static suffix proofs are clean, npm run typecheck and npm run lint pass, and the agent output service regression test passes. Continue with workspace-gd1m Wave 2c final verification: run the final *Async import/export/dead-bridge proofs plus full npm test and behavior spot checks.

sessionHistory.note: Completed workspace-9ld7: migrated remaining src/dashboard and src/lib callers/tests to Effect siblings, verified the static import gate has zero in-scope *Async imports from src/lib, and passed npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npm test.
Completed workspace-m9sw: deleted the now-unused src/lib/agents.ts *Async bridge exports, switched remaining same-file callers to Effect siblings, and verified npm run typecheck passes.
Completed workspace-egas: deleted the src/lib/tmux.ts *Async bridge exports, moved their behavior into Effect helpers, and verified npm run typecheck passes.

Completed workspace-mlz2: deleted the src/lib/config-yaml.ts *Async bridge exports/private Async helpers, migrated the remaining tts-watchdog caller to the Effect sibling, and verified npm run typecheck passes.

Completed workspace-k212: deleted the src/lib/vbrief/dag.ts *Async writer-lock bridge exports, moved task and pipeline plan writes into Effect-owned flows, migrated DAG writer-lock tests to Effect helpers, and verified npm run typecheck plus the dag-writer-lock tests pass.

Completed workspace-pzn7: canonicalized src/lib naming so Effect exports are unsuffixed, sync survivors use explicit *Sync names, stale *Effect/*AsyncEffect function/const exports are gone, and npm run typecheck, npm run lint, the agent-output-service targeted test, static suffix proofs, and graphify update pass.

w1a-gate.contextUpdate:
# PAN-1312 w1a-gate â€” exported `*Async` sibling map

## Result

A scan of exported symbols under `src/lib/**/*.ts` found 69 exported `*Async` APIs. 5 checkpoint-client exports are explicitly out of scope. Every other exported `*Async` API has a mapped Effect sibling, including plain-named Effect functions used by `src/lib/pan-dir/*` compatibility aliases.

## Verification

- `npm run typecheck` passed.
- `npm run build` passed.
- The build initially exposed missing `checkAgentHealthEffect` / `determineHealthStatusEffect` exports from `src/dashboard/lib/health-filtering.ts`; the module now exports those Effect-native functions and keeps the existing async wrappers as bridges.
